instruction: The red X mark on the ticket icon faces the wrong way. Mirror it back.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/ticket.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 6v.75m0 3v.75m0 3v.75m0 3V18m-9-5.25h5.25M7.5 15h3M3.375 5.25c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v3.026a2.999 2.999 0 0 1 0 5.198v3.026c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h17.25c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-3.026a2.999 2.999 0 0 1 0-5.198V6.375c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3.375Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="112,16 100,28 106,22 100,16 112,28" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/ticket.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 6v.75m0 3v.75m0 3v.75m0 3V18m-9-5.25h5.25M7.5 15h3M3.375 5.25c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v3.026a2.999 2.999 0 0 1 0 5.198v3.026c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h17.25c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-3.026a2.999 2.999 0 0 1 0-5.198V6.375c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3.375Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,16 112,28 106,22 112,16 100,28" />
</svg>
